description: Execute a complete investment workflow for a new position in Tesla (TSLA). Record a $2,500.00 deposit with the comment 'Capital Injection' using the current date. Add TSLA to 'My Watchlist' and record a buy transaction for 10 units at $175.50 with a $0 broker fee using the current date. Set a 'Fall Below' price alert for TSLA at $160.00.
